adds.rationale: Pure-play small-launch provider; newly public via SPAC merger closing Aug 25, 2021. Aligns with profile's 'invest early in next waves: rockets' mandate. Complements ARKX (broad space ETF) with a single-name early-stage bet.

news_evidence.summary: Rocket Lab begins trading on Nasdaq as RKLB after closing Vector Acquisition SPAC merger; ~$777M gross proceeds, $4.8B equity valuation.

adds.rationale: Dominant medical-robotics platform with widening installed base and procedure-volume tailwind from elective-surgery recovery. Profile names robotics as a next-wave bucket; ISRG diversifies BOTZ exposure into healthcare robotics.

news_evidence.summary: Q2 2021 8-K: da Vinci procedures +68% YoY, installed base grew to 6,335 systems (+10% YoY), Q2 revenue $1.46B (+72% YoY), 328 systems shipped.

adds.rationale: Leading US LNG exporter; profile names geopolitical-energy as a non-tech wave. European gas tightness in 2H 2021 (pre-Russia curtailment) is already lifting Atlantic-basin LNG netbacks, structurally favoring US export capacity.

news_evidence.summary: EIA notes global natural gas market entering a tighter supply-demand balance heading into winter 2021-22; European hub prices rising sharply, lifting demand for US LNG cargoes.

notes: Cap=24 with 13 slots free at as-of; using 3 of 3 add allowance. No removes: current 11 names span AI majors (AAPL/MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA/TSM), broad-beta (SPY), space (ARKX), robotics-AI (BOTZ), nuclear/uranium (URA/CCJ), and defense (LMT) - all consistent with stated waves. Excluded buckets respected (no engineered_biology; no solar/wind). All adds have dated evidence strictly before 2021-10-01; no post-date events cited (Omicron, Ukraine, Fed hikes, etc. suppressed).
